steps: %s %s Ingredients Quantity NaCl 3g bacto peptone 2.5g Agar 17g Double distilled H2O 972ml

%s %s Measure 972ml double distilled H2O and put in a 1L duran bottle with a magnetic flea Add 3g NaCl, 2.5g bacto peptone and stir. Stir until all solutes are dissolved then add the agar. Leave magnetic flea in bottle. Label, date and autoclave
authors: Cancer Research UK / Wellcome Gurdon Institute media kitchen
creator: Cristian Riccio
